auth.heroSub: Internal HR, ledger and document operations console. Use the email tied to your G-number.
auth.cardSub: Use the email connected to your G-number to continue.
auth.pickerSub: Recently signed in on this device. Select an account to continue.
auth.requestSub: New here? Enter your work email and G-number. An admin will review your details and set your permissions before you can sign in.
auth.requestSentText: Your request was sent to the admin team. You'll be able to sign in once an admin approves your account.
auth.forgotSub: Self-service reset isn't available. Contact your IT admin and they'll set a new temporary password for you.
auth.lockedText: Too many failed attempts. Contact IT to unlock your account; sign-in resumes after an admin clears the lock.
auth.errPending: Your account is awaiting admin approval.
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
auth.smallPrint: By signing in you agree to GSSG's acceptable use policy.

books.empty: No book entries match these filters.
books.confirmDelete: Soft-delete this entry? It stays in records; ref number is not reused.

bulk.deleteBody: Soft-delete the selected entries? They stay in records and ref numbers are not reused.

approval.noSignatureHint: Add your signing signature in Settings before approving.
approval.singleSignerHint: One manager signs and approves this book.
approval.sheetDescription: Review book details, approval chain, and take an action.
approval.reasonOrMark: Add a reason — type a note above, or leave a comment on the document.
approval.noApproversBody: A manager or admin must upload a signature in Settings → Signing before a book can be submitted for approval.
approval.noApproversSelfHint: You can sign — upload your signature in Settings.
approval.managerNoSignature: This manager has no signature on file yet — they'll need to add one in Settings → Signing before they can sign.
approval.managerNotLinked: No manager is linked to this document. Please select a signing manager.
approval.reviewersHint: Reviewers can comment and request changes before approval.

annotations.hint: Click to pin · drag to highlight

record.importedNoPreview: This imported record's file isn't a PDF, so it can't be previewed here.

preview.noDocument: No document on this draft yet.

preview.discardConfirmBody: This permanently removes the unsubmitted record.

pane.signedCopyFiled: Signed copy filed to {{ref}} — record approved

attachments.previewUnavailable: Preview isn't available for this file type

empty.heading: Click an email to see its content here
empty.desc: Select a message from the list to read it, reply, or take action.

tips: Type any G-number in an email and it auto-links the employee — no lookup needed.
Use "Add reference" to attach a Book or record to your reply.
Click ＋ next to a recipient to save them to your address book.
Reply-All keeps the original To and Cc — recipients are pre-filled.

recipients.noEmail: No email on file — links to references

outlook.composeBusy: Finish or close your current draft first.

ref.label: Ref
ref.attachPdf: Attach the reference's PDF when available

outlook.cxIdle: Open a message to see the people it's about.

rules.title: Correspondence Log — auto-capture rules
rules.description: Each rule files matching correspondence into a Correspondence Log category automatically.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Customize the application and manage data

account.title: Your account
account.description: The account you are currently signed in with.
account.name: Name

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.description: Text size and theme are set from the top navigation.
appearance.hint: Use the Aa slider and the moon/sun toggle in the top bar to customize the display.
appearance.sentryHint: Helps improve stability. No personal data is sent.

submitters.title: Submitters
submitters.description: People who can be picked as the submitter on application forms.
submitters.name: Name

managers.title: Managers
managers.description: Link each manager to a login account so approval routing works automatically.

advanced.title: Advanced
advanced.openExplorerNote: Opens via pywebview bridge when running packaged

email.heading: Email integration
email.description: Connect an IMAP mailbox so incoming and outgoing messages are auto-imported into the General Ledger. Password is encrypted locally on this machine.
email.ionosOnly: GSSG uses IONOS for email. Other providers are not supported.
email.linkHint: Helps the app default the submitter and signer on every form you fill in.
email.linkAdminOnly: Only the app admin can change the linked employee
email.confirmDeleteDesc: This will remove the email account and stop syncing.

signature.title: Email signature
signature.description: Appended to outgoing email when enabled on the compose toolbar.

signingSignature.title: Signing signature
signingSignature.description: Embedded in a book's PDF when you approve and sign it. Separate from the email signature and the employee-vault signature.

sigAppearance.title: Signature appearance
sigAppearance.description: How your signature is sized and weighted on generated documents.
sigAppearance.noSignature: Upload your signature above to see a preview.
sigAppearance.pageScaleHint: Shown at actual scale on the page

welcome.title: Migrate from GSSG v3.5.4
welcome.subtitle: Import your employees, leaves, book records, and vault files from the existing v3.5.4 data directory into v4. A timestamped backup will be created before anything is changed.

importing.status: Importing… this may take a minute.

summary.heading: Migration complete
summary.detail: Imported {{employees}} employees, {{leaves}} leaves, {{books}} books. Originals backed up to {{backup}}.

skip.title: Skip migration?
skip.confirm: You can run this later from Settings → System. Skip for now?

access.title: Access requests
access.notAuthorized: You need admin access to view this page.

pending.emptySub: No pending access requests. New requests show up here and ping the bell.

defaultManager.notEligible: Needs an active account, the approve-books permission and an uploaded signature (Settings → Signing).

reject.title: Reject this request?
reject.body: {{name}} will be told to contact IT. The email and G-number stay on file.

resetModal.title: Reset password
resetModal.body: Set a temporary password for {{name}}. They can change it after signing in.
resetModal.label: New password

settingsCard.title: Access requests
settingsCard.desc: Approve people who requested access, and manage existing users.

permissions.title: Permissions
permissions.subtitle: Grant or revoke individual capabilities per user. Roles set the defaults; overrides layer on top.
permissions.adminAll: Admins always have every capability — overrides don't apply.

perms.locked: You need permission for {{label}}. Click to request access.
